revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:御器所八幡宮, en:Gokiso Hachimangū); add local discussion section + dated import note

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gokiso_Hachimang%C5%AB here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gokiso_Hachimang%C5%AB for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/70781656 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:御器所八幡宮 | revid=70781656 --> {{Talkheader}}{{出典検索}}
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1198848961 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:39, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Gokiso Hachimangū | revid=1198848961 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Stub| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=low|shinto=yes}} }} ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q3109957]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:32, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
